title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: The filmmaker explores some of the unusual causes of death including a lawnmower killing a football spectator, deadly beards and more.

title: Kumbh: Among the Seekers
desc: The filmmaker showcases the Kumbh Mela in India and shines a light on the many elements, both human and technical, that create this unique experience.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: The crew works hard to restore a rare British 1950s Ariel Square-Four motorcycle. Meanwhile, Tyler helps Ron and Leonard sharpen their fork-lift skills.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Ivy brings his son to Moreno Valley and leaves with yo-yos of an unexpected kind. Meanwhile, Rene and Casey discover that their shoes are counterfeit.

title: Storage Wars
desc: Ivy gains a bit of Slavic success at a supervisory role in Stanton. Meanwhile, Brandi helps Danielle decorate her new apartment.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Storage Wars
desc: The buyers gamble on a new facility in La Habra, while Dusty tries his luck on a new unit and Kenny picks out a new locker.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host sheds light on Indian culture by travelling across the country to explore food, rituals, traditions and some rare talents.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Top bladesmiths from different walks of life compete to create the best weapons and prove their effectiveness in a series of daunting challenges.

title: Shipping Wars
desc: Marc's run to Roswell leaves him proud to be from this world, while Todd and Tamera end up needing more than a few quarters to extend their vintage game pod run.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host meets Jyothi Vignesh, who embarks on an extraordinary journey across India in his modest E-Auto and explores every nook and cranny of the country.

title: Indian Army 24 Hours
desc: Step into the world of military operations, where soldiers brave extreme conditions, utilise cutting-edge technology and uphold national security round the clock.

title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
desc: A pair of brazen killers execute a daring breakout from Elmira State Prison when the convicts scale the towering forty-foot walls, fleeing via the rooftop.

title: Nature Gone Wild
desc: Nature goes wild as astonished hunters encounter a talented bear that climbs trees and a bull moose who stops snowmobilers in their tracks.

title: The Einstein Challenge
desc: Culinary experts highlight the less attractive food facts like how gelatin is made, the hidden hacks of competitive eating and the proper method of approaching a pufferfish.

title: Kings of Restoration
desc: Kyle Bush and Marcus Smith ask Rick to make a trophy inspired by NASCAR's past. Meanwhile, Ron reveals a crush and decides to join Rick on his trip to the History 300 race.

title: Forged in Fire
desc: Four smiths must forge signature blades from the metal found in various household items. After a couple tough rounds, two smiths head to their forges to recreate one of history's most iconic sabres.

title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
desc: The host visits different regions in India and sheds light on the people creating innovative products and solutions, such as a driverless tractor, pizza vending machine and a vegetable-based dessert.

desc: The buyers gamble on a new facility in La Habra, while Dusty tries his luck on a new unit and Kenny picks out a new locker.

title: Counting Cars
desc: Danny inspects a collection featuring a 1993 Ford Roadster and 1953 Henry J. Later, Kevin, Ryan and Mike experience the strain of proving their unauthorized purchase's worth.

title: Pawn Stars
desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
desc: There are tales of people who accomplished improbable feats like freefalling 30,000 feet without a parachute and getting trapped inside a sunken ship for three days and lived to tell the tale.

title: History's Greatest Heists With Pierce Brosnan
desc: Disguised as policemen, two thieves steal expensive artwork from the Boston museum. In a strange turn of events, all the suspects turn up dead upon investigation.
